seoTitle: Randolph County School System Calendar 2027-2028 | Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: View the Randolph County School System 2027-2028 calendar including first day of school, holidays, teacher workdays, breaks, early dismissal dates, PDF, and calendar download options.
calendarNotes: Randolph County School System starts the 2027-2028 school year on August 23, 2027 and ends on June 7, 2028 with a 2-hour early dismissal. Student no-school periods include Thanksgiving holidays November 25-26, winter annual leave and holidays December 20-January 3, and annual leave April 10-13 followed by a holiday on April 14 and workday on April 17. The calendar also lists teacher workdays, report cards, interim reports, quarter dates, early releases, and inclement-weather make-up days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Randolph County School System start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Monday, August 23, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Randolph County School System Spring Break in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The main spring annual leave period runs Monday, April 10 through Thursday, April 13, 2028, followed by a holiday on April 14.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Randolph County School System in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last student day is Wednesday, June 7, 2028, with a 2-hour early dismissal.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 23, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring annual leave runs April 10-13, followed by a holiday on April 14, 2028.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last student day is June 7, 2028.
